creator: mvharding@gmail.com
text:
If I attempt to use the 'latest' packages on FreeBSD (I am using amd64), including on a virtual machine, an attempt to use 'settings' core dumps as follows once I try to set power options:

$ gnome-control-center

(gnome-control-center:83588): GLib-GIO-ERROR **: 09:37:11.984: Settings schema 'org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.power' does not contain a key named 'power-saver-profile-on-low-battery'
Trace/BPT trap (core dumped)

I am currently unable to change any settings and (possibly related) the screensaver just goes to a black screen rather than turning off my monitor.

I see the following ports install, perhaps there is a schema difference that keeps this from working?

gnome-control-center-41.0      Control center for GNOME 3 project
gsettings-desktop-schemas-41.0 Collection of globally shared GSetting schemas
gnome-power-manager-3.32.0     Power management system for the GNOME Desktop
gnome-settings-daemon-3.38.2   GNOME 3 settings daemon
